# HPD.ML.Core.InMemoryDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../data/in-memory-data.md)

Columnar in-memory data. Supports cursor, async stream, and zero-copy tensor batch access. This is what Materialize() returns.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class InMemoryDataHandle : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IDataHandle
```
